<style type="text/css">:root {
	--accent-red: #BA2D0B;
	--black: #0D0106;
	--white: #ffffff;
	--dark-grey: #2D2D2A;
	--light-grey: #EFEFF0;
	--primary-blue: #0666A8;
	--secondary-blue: #03304F;
	--secondary-blue: #03304F;
	--light-blue: #3f92cc;
}

/* Global transitions */
a,
input[type="submit"],
.btn { transition: .3s; }


/* Global colors */
a { color: var(--accent-red) !important; }
a:hover { color: var(--accent-red) !important; }
body { color: var(--black); }



/* Sidebar - Main navigation */
.menu-item a { color: var(--white) !important; }
.menu-item a:hover {
	background-color: var(--accent-red) !important;
}

/* Globa elelements non-WCAG */
section#page_footer { border-color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }

section#section_three { border-color: var(--accent-red) !important; }



/* To Navigation background */
section#header {background-color: var(--light-blue) !important; }
/* To Navigation */
section#header .header-menu ul li a {
	background-color: var(--secondary-blue) !important;
	color: var(--white) !important;
/* 	border: 1px solid transparent !important; */
}

	background-color: var(--white) !important;
	color: var(--secondary-blue) !important;
		border: 2px solid var(--primary-blue);
}
/* To Navigation Last Button */
section#header .header-menu ul li:last-child a {

} */

section#header .header-menu ul li:last-child a:hover {
	color: var(--accent-red) !important; 
	background-color: var(--white) !important;

}
/* Top Phone number */
header .right .phone a { color: var(--accent-red) !important; }
header .right .phone a:hover { color: var(--accent-red) !important; }


/* Icons - Fontawesome */
.fa { color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }


/* Headings */
h1.blue,
h2.blue,
h3.blue { color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }

.entry-content h2,
.entry-content h1,
.entry-content h3 { color: var(--primary-blue) }


/* Help Box */
.help-box { color: var(--accent-red) !important; }


/* Staff  */
.staff p.name { color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }


/* Footer */
section#footer { background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }
/* Footer - Phone Box */
section#footer .phone-box { background-color: var(--accent-red) !important; }
section#footer .phone-box .fa { color: var(--white) !important; }
section#footer .footer-menu ul li a { color: var(--white) !important; }
section#footer .footer-menu ul li a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }



/* Request Help Form */
section#section_four {
	background: linear-gradient( to right, var(--primary-blue) 0%, var(--primary-blue) 50%, var(--light-grey) 50%, var(--light-grey) 100% ) !important;
}
section#section_four .left { background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }
section#section_four .right { background-color: var(--light-grey) !important; }
section#section_four .left input[type="submit"] { 
	background-color: var(--accent-red) !important; 
	border: 1px solid var(--white) !important;
}
section#section_four .left input[type="submit"]:hover {
	background-color: var(--white) !important;
	color: var(--secondary-blue) !important;
}
section#section_four .right span { background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }

.form-group.white .error-msg {
	color: var(--white) !important;
}
section#section_four .left input[type="text"],
section#section_four .left input[type="email"] {
	background-color: var(--white) !important;
}
.znt-form-label {
	margin-bottom: 0;
}
.znt-form-label.white { color: var(--white) !important; }


/* Testiomonial Names */
.znt-testimonial-name {
	color: var(--primary-blue) !important;
	font-weight: bold;
}


/* Buttons */
.btn.btn-primary.znt-accent {
	background-color: var(--accent-red) !important;
	border: 1px solid var(--accent-red) !important;
}

.btn.btn-primary.znt-accent:hover {
	background-color: var(--white) !important;
	color: var(--accent-red) !important;
}


.btn.btn-primary {
	background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important;
	border: 1px solid var(--primary-blue) !important;
}

.btn.btn-primary:hover,
section#section_four .right a .btn.btn-primary:hover {
	background-color: var(--white) !important;
	color: var(--primary-blue) !important;
}


.znt-close-menu-button i,
.nav-back i {
	color: var(--white) !important;
}


.btn-default {
	border-color: var(--primary-blue);
}

.btn-default:hover {
	background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important;
	color: var(--white) !important;
}


/* Slider bullets container */
.n2-ss-slider-controls,
.n2-ss-slider-controls .nextend-bullet-bar {
	background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important;
}



/* Input form color */
.wpcf7-form-control:not([type="submit"]) {
	color: var(--black) !important;
}</style>

}

.home .error-msg,
.home .wpcf7-response-output {
	color: #fff !important;
	position: relative;
}


/* Status message  */

.screen-reader-response {
    position: relative !important;
    overflow:  hidden !important;
    clip:  initial !important;
    clip-path: initial !important;
    height: initial !important;
    width: initial !important;
    margin: initial !important;
    padding: initial !important;
    border: initial !important;
    word-wrap: initial !important;
}

.screen-reader-response ul { display: none !important; }

.screen-reader-response p {
	padding-left: 32px;
	overflow: hidden;
	margin: 0 !important;
	
}

.screen-reader-response:before {
   content: "";
	position: absolute;
	left: 0;
	top: 0;
	display: inline-block;
	width: 20px;
	height: 18px;
	background-size: contain;
	background-repeat: no-repeat;
	background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,);
}


.home .screen-reader-response p {
	color: #fff !important;
	
}

.home .screen-reader-response:before {
	background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,);
}

.error-msg {
	padding-left: 30px;
	margin-top: 3px;
	position: relative;
}

.error-msg:before {
   content: "";
	position: absolute;
	left: 0;
	top: 3px;
	display: inline-block;
	width: 20px;
	height: 18px;
	background-size: contain;
	background-repeat: no-repeat;
	background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,);
}




.home .error-msg:before {

}






/* Request Form alignment */

    background: var(--primary-blue) !important;
	padding: 15px 45px 15px;
}

.form-box h2.white {
    color: #ffffff !important;
}

.form-box input[type="submit"] {
    background-color: var(--accent-red) !important;
    border: 1px solid var(--white) !important;
    width: 100%;
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: bold;
    color: #FFF;
}

.photo-box img {
    float: left;
    margin-right: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
}

#bottom a {
    font-weight: 700;
}

.klaviyo-form a {
    color: #fff !important;
    text-decoration: underline;
}
/* Info Box Styling */
/* Keep rows even */
.home .info-boxes .row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: stretch;
}

/* Each box side-by-side inside itself */
.home .info-box {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row; /* horizontal layout */
  height: 100%;
  background: #fff;
  overflow: hidden;
}

/* Left side: image column */
.home  .info-box .photo {
  flex: 0 0 50%; /* image takes 50% of box width */
  overflow: hidden;
  display: flex;
}

/* Image fills entire column vertically */
.home .info-box .photo img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
}

/* Right side: text column */
.home .info-box .text {
  flex: 1;
  padding: 0px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
}

/* Make all boxes equal height in the row */
.home .col-md-4 {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.home .col-md-4 > .info-box {
  flex-grow: 1;
}

/* Optional: mobile stacking */
@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .home .info-box {
    flex-direction: column; /* stack image above text on small screens */
  }
  .home .info-box .photo {
    flex: 0 0 auto;
    height: 200px;
  }
}

.home #section_three .info-box .text h3 {
  margin-top: 0;        /* remove large default top margin */
  margin-bottom: 10px;  /* tighten gap below the title */
  line-height: 1.2;     /* keep compact vertical spacing */
}

.home #section_three .info-box .text {
  padding-top: 10px;
  padding-bottom: 10px;
}</style> <script language="javascript" type="litespeed/javascript">var PAGERESULT=888</script> <script type="litespeed/javascript">window.__lo_site_id=75537;(function(){var wa=document.createElement('script');wa.type='text/javascript';wa.async=!0;wa.src='https://d10lpsik1i8c69.cloudfront.net/w.js';var s=document.getElementsByTagName('script')[0];s.parentNode.insertBefore(wa,s)})()</script> </head><body class="home wp-singular page-template-default page page-id-1 wp-theme-malibu">

Whether you're seeking treatment for yourself or helping someone you care about find support for addiction, alcoholism, or <a href="https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/co-occurring-mental-disorders-with-substance-use/">co-occurring disorders</a>, you've found the right place.</p><p>At Serenity Malibu, we go beyond traditional treatment. We create a true home away from home and take pride in our whole-person approach to drug and alcohol recovery. By addressing body, spirit, and mind through cutting-edge treatment methods and extensive one-on-one therapy, we give our clients a strong foundation for lasting sobriety. Our comprehensive approach and dedicated care make Serenity a premier choice for <a href="https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/contact-us/https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/contact-us/">rehab in California</a>, setting our clients up for sustained recovery long after treatment ends.</p></div></div></div></section><section id="section_five"><div class="container"><div class="row"><div class="col-md-12 right"><h2 class="blue">A Healing Sanctuary Overlooking the Pacific</h2><p>Set above the Pacific Ocean, Serenity Malibu offers a peaceful retreat where the demands of everyday life fade away. Our personalized treatment tracks adapt to each client's unique needs, creating a foundation for lasting recovery. From your first day through months of aftercare support—including sober companions and coaches—you'll experience care that extends well beyond typical treatment. Our experienced medical professionals and staff bring years of addiction recovery expertise, combined with genuine understanding of the challenges you face.</p><p>Our therapeutic offerings include equine therapy, art for recovery, acting and cooking therapy, alongside physical activities that ground your recovery: surfing, kayaking, yoga, meditation, tennis, and fitness programs. We believe discovering activities you love strengthens your path forward.</p><p>Taking the step toward treatment requires courage. At Serenity Malibu, we honor that courage with exceptional care designed to help you reclaim your life.</p><p style="text-align: center;"><a href="https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/gallery/">Tour Serenity Malibu Facility</a></p></div></div></div></section><section id="section_three"><div class="container info-boxes open-box"><div class="row"><div class="col-md-4"><div class="info-box"><div class="photo">

pages.rawText:
Top Luxury Residential Drug Treatment Center - Serenity Malibu 
 

 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 What to Expect from Our Rehab 

 Our Staff 

 Treatment Programs 

 Insurance Verification 

 Tour 

 Contact 
 

 

 
 
 

Standing by 24/7 - Free Insurance Check 

 424-235-2009
 

 Call Now 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 Welcome 

 About Us 

 Treatment 
 Drug Addiction Treatment 

 Dual Diagnosis Treatment Center 

 Detox Treatment Center 

 Outpatient Rehab Centers 
 

 What to Expect from Our Rehab 

 Admissions 

 Amenities 

 Financing 

 Free Insurance Verification 

 Our Staff 

 Executive & Professional Addiction Treatment Program 

 Gallery 

 Reviews & Testimonials 

 Contact Us 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

WORLD CLASS TREATMENT

WORLD CLASS TREATMENT

 

Learn More

 

Doctorate Level One-on-One Therapy

DOCTORATE LEVEL ONE-ON-ONE THERAPY

 

Learn More

 

Luxurious Amenities

LUXURIOUS AMENITIES

 

Learn More

 

 

 

 

Luxury Rehab Center - Serenity Malibu

 

 CARF-Accredited, Luxury Rehab Center in Malibu, California 

Serenity Malibu is a CARF-accredited, luxury treatment center specializing in substance abuse recovery. Located in the beautiful setting of Malibu, California, we offer world-class facilities and personalized care to support our clients on their path to lasting recovery.

Our comprehensive treatment programs address all types of substance use disorders, including—but not limited to—alcohol, prescription medications, opioids, cocaine, cannabis, and other drugs. Each individual receives a customized treatment plan tailored to their specific substance use history and the severity of their addiction.

Our team of certified professionals brings extensive experience, compassion, and a holistic approach to each client's journey. We combine evidence-based therapies with personalized care to ensure the most effective and supportive treatment experience possible.

We are proud to be recognized as one of the most recommended rehab centers in California . Over 95% of our clients say they would recommend Serenity Malibu to friends and family—a powerful testament to the quality of care we provide. The confidence our clients place in us drives our unwavering commitment to helping individuals reclaim their lives and shape a brighter future.

 

 

 

 

Experience the luxurious facilities and world-class amenities at Serenity Treatment Center in Malibu, California. We focus on personalized treatment for each of our clients which makes us different from other traditional rehab centers. Our therapist examines each patient individually and creates the most effective treatment plan for them. Our staff includes top therapists and doctors who diligently work for your long-term sobriety.

Our Malibu rehab center is proud to be one of the top rehab centers in the country. We do our utmost to ensure this reputation is maintained every day. We strongly believe that no other rehab center cares about their patient's safety and long-term recovery as much as we do.

Client Testimonials

"Thank you for everything you’ve done, for indulging my insecurities and impatience from time to time, and for helping me keep the faith. And your staff includes many people who have made an impact, and who have gone the extra mile for my niece when she was at her most difficult. Please thank them and express our appreciation – it takes a village, as they say."

Brett, New York

"Everyone here was extremely helpful and kind while I was detoxing and it made my experience a great one. Not only am I extremely grateful for the help I got to get sober, I am beyond grateful that I learned the necessary tools in order to stay sober. I have gotten my life back and I couldn't be more thankful for the help I received. I was very comfortable and felt at home, which is exactly what I needed to get me through that tough time. I can't thank you enough!"

Michael, CA

"There are no words to accurately express my gratitude to Serenity Malibu. I came to Serenity for transitional living after going through an inpatient rehab. I was fully detoxed from drugs but still a little unsure how to live a fun yet productive sober life; I learned how to do this at Serenity Malibu."

Christy, Alabama

 View More Serenity Malibu Reviews 

Request Help

 
 

The fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required

 Name * 

 

 Email (format name@domain.com) * 

 

 Phone Number * 

 

 How did you Hear About Us? 

 

 How Can We Help? 

 

 

 

We Accept Most PPO Insurance Plans

 

 Check Benefits Now 

Why Our Malibu Rehab Center is One of the Top Rated Rehabs in the US

 

By Calling 424-235-2009 , Speak With An Addiction Specialist & Take Your First Step Today.

Serenity Malibu is a world-class rehab facility, located in Malibu, California, offering personalized clinical and holistic care. Our one-on-one approach helps clients move beyond addiction recovery to uncover and heal the deeper issues driving self-medication.

Our evidence-based therapies include Brainspotting, EMDR, and Somatic Experience. At our luxury Malibu rehab, we embrace diverse recovery paths through SMART Recovery and Refuge Recovery support groups. Every primary therapist at Serenity holds a doctorate in psychology. We integrate yoga, acupuncture, massage, cranial-sacral therapy, hiking, hypnotherapy, and spiritual counseling to restore mind, body, and spirit.

Set in an exceptional 5-star environment, we provide on-site medical detox when needed. Our culinary team crafts nutritious, gourmet meals tailored to individual dietary requirements. At Serenity, healing is our genuine commitment.

The Best Treatment for Addiction in Malibu California

 

While many rehabilitation centers make bold claims, Serenity Malibu stands apart through our proven approach to recovery in California. Whether you're seeking treatment for yourself or helping someone you care about find support for addiction, alcoholism, or co-occurring disorders , you've found the right place.

At Serenity Malibu, we go beyond traditional treatment. We create a true home away from home and take pride in our whole-person approach to drug and alcohol recovery. By addressing body, spirit, and mind through cutting-edge treatment methods and extensive one-on-one therapy, we give our clients a strong foundation for lasting sobriety. Our comprehensive approach and dedicated care make Serenity a premier choice for rehab in California , setting our clients up for sustained recovery long after treatment ends.

A Healing Sanctuary Overlooking the Pacific

Set above the Pacific Ocean, Serenity Malibu offers a peaceful retreat where the demands of everyday life fade away. Our personalized treatment tracks adapt to each client's unique needs, creating a foundation for lasting recovery. From your first day through months of aftercare support—including sober companions and coaches—you'll experience care that extends well beyond typical treatment. Our experienced medical professionals and staff bring years of addiction recovery expertise, combined with genuine understanding of the challenges you face.

Our therapeutic offerings include equine therapy, art for recovery, acting and cooking therapy, alongside physical activities that ground your recovery: surfing, kayaking, yoga, meditation, tennis, and fitness programs. We believe discovering activities you love strengthens your path forward.

Taking the step toward treatment requires courage. At Serenity Malibu, we honor that courage with exceptional care designed to help you reclaim your life.

 Tour Serenity Malibu Facility 

 

Malibu

A peaceful Malibu setting where ocean views inspire calm and renewal.

 

Serenity

A private sanctuary devoted to healing mind, body, and spirit.

 

What to Expect

Compassionate care tailored to your recovery journey.

Statement from the CEO and Founder

 

My name is Don Varden and I am the CEO and Founder of Serenity Malibu. I would like to thank you for taking the time to review Serenity’s website. Serenity Malibu provides addiction and alcoholism treatment like no other treatment center around. The results speak for themselves. We have been independently rated as one of the top rehab centers in the world. Come to Serenity and tour our facility , meet with our clinical staff and find out for yourself why our personalized, one-on-one approach to addiction treatment makes us the best choice for you or a loved one to finally achieve long-term sobriety.

 Don Varden, 

CEO and Founder

As Seen On:

If you are thinking about quitting alcohol or benzodiazepines such as Xanax, Valium or Klonopin,…

 
January 29, 2026

<style type="text/css">:root {
	--accent-red: #BA2D0B;
	--black: #0D0106;
	--white: #ffffff;
	--dark-grey: #2D2D2A;
	--light-grey: #EFEFF0;
	--primary-blue: #0666A8;
	--secondary-blue: #03304F;
	--secondary-blue: #03304F;
	--light-blue: #3f92cc;
}

/* Global transitions */
a,
input[type="submit"],
.btn { transition: .3s; }


/* Global colors */
a { color: var(--accent-red) !important; }
a:hover { color: var(--accent-red) !important; }
body { color: var(--black); }



/* Sidebar - Main navigation */
.menu-item a { color: var(--white) !important; }
.menu-item a:hover {
	background-color: var(--accent-red) !important;
}

/* Globa elelements non-WCAG */
section#page_footer { border-color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }

section#section_three { border-color: var(--accent-red) !important; }



/* To Navigation background */
section#header {background-color: var(--light-blue) !important; }
/* To Navigation */
section#header .header-menu ul li a {
	background-color: var(--secondary-blue) !important;
	color: var(--white) !important;
/* 	border: 1px solid transparent !important; */
}
section#header .header-menu ul li a:hover {
	background-color: var(--white) !important;
	color: var(--secondary-blue) !important;
		border: 2px solid var(--primary-blue);
}
/* To Navigation Last Button */
section#header .header-menu ul li:last-child a { 
/* 	background-color: var(--accent-red) !important; */
/* 	border: 1px solid var(--white) !important; */
}
/* section#header .header-menu ul li:last-child a:after {
	content: "";
	width: calc(100% - 8px);
	height: calc(100% - 10px);
	position: absolute;
	top: 4px;
	left: 4px;
	border: 2px solid var(--light-blue);
} */

section#header .header-menu ul li:last-child a:hover {
	color: var(--accent-red) !important; 
	background-color: var(--white) !important;

}
/* Top Phone number */
header .right .phone a { color: var(--accent-red) !important; }
header .right .phone a:hover { color: var(--accent-red) !important; }


/* Icons - Fontawesome */
.fa { color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }


/* Headings */
h1.blue,
h2.blue,
h3.blue { color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }

.entry-content h2,
.entry-content h1,
.entry-content h3 { color: var(--primary-blue) }


/* Help Box */
.help-box { color: var(--accent-red) !important; }


/* Staff  */
.staff p.name { color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }


/* Footer */
section#footer { background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }
/* Footer - Phone Box */
section#footer .phone-box { background-color: var(--accent-red) !important; }
section#footer .phone-box .fa { color: var(--white) !important; }
section#footer .footer-menu ul li a { color: var(--white) !important; }
section#footer .footer-menu ul li a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }



/* Request Help Form */
section#section_four {
	background: linear-gradient( to right, var(--primary-blue) 0%, var(--primary-blue) 50%, var(--light-grey) 50%, var(--light-grey) 100% ) !important;
}
section#section_four .left { background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }
section#section_four .right { background-color: var(--light-grey) !important; }
section#section_four .left input[type="submit"] { 
	background-color: var(--accent-red) !important; 
	border: 1px solid var(--white) !important;
}
section#section_four .left input[type="submit"]:hover {
	background-color: var(--white) !important;
	color: var(--secondary-blue) !important;
}
section#section_four .right span { background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }

.form-group.white .error-msg {
	color: var(--white) !important;
}
section#section_four .left input[type="text"],
section#section_four .left input[type="email"] {
	background-color: var(--white) !important;
}
.znt-form-label {
	margin-bottom: 0;
}
.znt-form-label.white { color: var(--white) !important; }


/* Testiomonial Names */
.znt-testimonial-name {
	color: var(--primary-blue) !important;
	font-weight: bold;
}


/* Buttons */
.btn.btn-primary.znt-accent {
	background-color: var(--accent-red) !important;
	border: 1px solid var(--accent-red) !important;
}

.btn.btn-primary.znt-accent:hover {
	background-color: var(--white) !important;
	color: var(--accent-red) !important;
}


.btn.btn-primary {
	background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important;
	border: 1px solid var(--primary-blue) !important;
}

.btn.btn-primary:hover,
section#section_four .right a .btn.btn-primary:hover {
	background-color: var(--white) !important;
	color: var(--primary-blue) !important;
}


.znt-close-menu-button i,
.nav-back i {
	color: var(--white) !important;
}


.btn-default {
	border-color: var(--primary-blue);
}

.btn-default:hover {
	background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important;
	color: var(--white) !important;
}


/* Slider bullets container */
.n2-ss-slider-controls,
.n2-ss-slider-controls .nextend-bullet-bar {
	background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important;
}



/* Input form color */
.wpcf7-form-control:not([type="submit"]) {
	color: var(--black) !important;
}</style>
<style type="text/css">/* Add your CSS code here.

For example:
.example {
    color: red;
}

For brushing up on your CSS knowledge, check out http://www.w3schools.com/css/css_syntax.asp

End of comment */ 

/* Form Styles */

.form-control {
	border: 1px solid #666;
}

.form-submit input[type="submit"] {
	background-color: #666;
}

/* .form-control:not([aria-invalid="true"]) { 
	display: none; 
} */

.form-control:not([aria-invalid="true"]) + .error-msg { 
	display: none; 
}

#date-error-msg_02:not(:last-child) { display: block !important; }

.wpcf7-not-valid-tip { 
	display: none !important; 
	visibility: hidden !important;
}

.error-msg {
/* 	font-size: 12px;
	font-weight: 700; */
	color: #BA2D0B; 
    font-size: 1em;
    font-weight: normal;
}

.error-msg + .error-msg,
#date-error-msg_02 + #date-error-msg_02 { display: none !important; }

.wpcf7-response-output {
	display: none !important;
}

.home .error-msg,
.home .wpcf7-response-output {
	color: #fff !important;
	position: relative;
}


/* Status message  */

.screen-reader-response {
    position: relative !important;
    overflow:  hidden !important;
    clip:  initial !important;
    clip-path: initial !important;
    height: initial !important;
    width: initial !important;
    margin: initial !important;
    padding: initial !important;
    border: initial !important;
    word-wrap: initial !important;
}

.screen-reader-response ul { display: none !important; }

.screen-reader-response p {
	padding-left: 32px;
	overflow: hidden;
	margin: 0 !important;
	
}

.screen-reader-response:before {
   content: "";
	position: absolute;
	left: 0;
	top: 0;
	display: inline-block;
	width: 20px;
	height: 18px;
	background-size: contain;
	background-repeat: no-repeat;
	background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,);
}


.home .screen-reader-response p {
	color: #fff !important;
	
}

.home .screen-reader-response:before {
	background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,);
}

.error-msg {
	padding-left: 30px;
	margin-top: 3px;
	position: relative;
}

.error-msg:before {
   content: "";
	position: absolute;
	left: 0;
	top: 3px;
	display: inline-block;
	width: 20px;
	height: 18px;
	background-size: contain;
	background-repeat: no-repeat;
	background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,);
}




.home .error-msg:before {
	background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,);
}






/* Request Form alignment */
.col-sm-6.left {
	margin-left: -1px;
}</style>
<style type="text/css">/* Add your CSS code here.

For brushing up on your CSS knowledge, check out http://www.w3schools.com/css/css_syntax.asp

body:not(.menu_in) .main-nav:not(.main-nav-open) a,
body:not(.menu_in) .main-nav:not(.main-nav-open) .znt-close-menu-button { display: none; } 

body.menu_in .backdrop {
	position: fixed;
    z-index: 900;
    display: block;
    opacity: 0.5;
}

body.menu_in .main-nav {
    right: 0px;
}

.znt-menu-button,
.znt-close-menu-button {
	background: none;
	border: none;
}


/* Social Network Component */
#at15s {
	display: block !important;
}

.atm-s a:focus {
	outline: 2px solid black !important;
	outline-offset: 4px !important;
}


.atm-f {
	display: none !important;
}


/* Removes a duplicated submenu under Admissions */
.menu-item.menu-item-first {
	display: none !important;
}

.nav-back {
	display: none !important;
}

/* .menu-item > a[aria-expanded="false"] + .sub-menu {
	display: none !important;
} */

/* Updated for functionality */
.sub-menu {
	display: block;
}

.main-nav ul li:hover > a {
	background-color: var(--accent-red);
}



.menu-item .sub-menu {
	position: relative;
    top: initial;
    left: initial;
}

.menu-item .sub-menu .menu-item {
	padding-left: 0px;
}

#menu-main-menu {
	left: 0 !important;
}</style>
<style type="text/css">/* Smart Slider */

/* Previous/Next Arrow focus */

#n2-ss-2-arrow-previous:focus {
	outline: 1px solid black;
}

#n2-ss-2-arrow-next:focus {
	outline: 1px solid black;
}

div#n2-ss-2 .nextend-bullet-bar .n2-bullet:focus {
    outline: 1px solid white;
    outline-offset: 2px;
}

div#n2-ss-2 .nextend-bullet-bar .n2-bullet:hover {
    outline: 1px solid black;
    outline-offset: 2px;
}

/* Home Page Smart Slider */

.home_slider_heading h2 {
/* 	-webkit-text-stroke-width: 1px !important;
 	-webkit-text-stroke-color: black !important; */
    color: #FFF !important;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif !important;
    font-size: 42px !important;
	font-weight: 500 !important;
    text-transform: uppercase !important;
    text-align: center !important;
	word-break: break-word;
	line-height: 1.1 !important;

}


div#n2-ss-3 .n2-font-577e3e94d392c80545fffaf7623e9404-hover {
	font-size: 275%;
	font-weight: 500;
}

div#n2-ss-3 .n2-font-745e90fc2310c85013da2bf7c9fd0a33-hover {
	font-size: 275%;
	font-weight: 500;
}





/* Slider reflow fixes */

@media(max-width: 920px) {
	.n2-ss-slider-controls {
		visibility: visible !important;
		background-color: #fff;
		z-index: 99;
	}
	
	.n2-ss-slider-controls-absolute-left {
		left: 0 !important;
		right: initial !important;
	}
	
	.n2-ss-slider-controls-absolute-right {
		left: initial !important;
		right: 0 !important;
	}
}



/* Slider bullets */

#n2-ss-3 > div > div.n2-ss-slider-controls.n2-ss-slider-controls-below > div > div > div > div:focus {
	outline: 1px solid #fff !important;
	outline-offset: 2px;
}

.n2-bullet {
	border: 1px solid #fff !important;
}

div#n2-ss-2 .nextend-bullet-bar .n2-bullet:hover {
	outline: 1px solid #fff !important;
}

.n2-ss-slider-controls {
	position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
/* 	transform: translateX(-50%); */
/*     width: 100%; */
    z-index: 99;
}

.n2-ss-slider-controls.n2-ss-slider-controls-below {
	width: 100% !important;
}

.n2-ss-slider-controls .n2-ss-control-bullet {
	margin-top: 0;
}

.nextend-arrow-previous {
	position: absolute !important;
    top: 50% !important;
    left: -50px !important;
}

.nextend-arrow-next {
	position: absolute !important;
    top: 50% !important;
    right: -50px !important;
}

.n2-section-smartslider.fitvidsignore.n2_clear:focus:after {
	content: "";
	position: absolute;
	top: 4px;
	left: 4px;
	width: calc(100% - 8px);
	height: calc(100% - 50px);
	border: 2px solid #fff;
}

@media(max-width: 1276px) {
	
	.n2-ss-slider-controls.n2-ss-slider-controls-below {
		z-index: 9;
	}
	
	.n2-ss-slider-controls {
		z-index: 999;
	}
	
	.nextend-arrow-next,
	.nextend-arrow-previous {
		top: calc(100% - 36px) !important;
		right: 4px !important;
		background-color: #fff;
	}
	
	.nextend-arrow-previous {
		left: 4px !important;
		right: initial !important;
	}
	
	
}

@media(max-width: 991px) {
	
	.home_slider_heading h2 {
		font-size: 20px !important;
		-webkit-text-stroke-width: .125px !important;
	}
	
	.n2-section-smartslider.fitvidsignore.n2_clear:focus:after {
		height: calc(100% - 26px);
	}
	
	.nextend-bullet-bar {
		padding: 0px !important;
	}
	
	.nextend-arrow-next,
	.nextend-arrow-previous {
		top: calc(100% - 18px) !important;
	}
}

@media(max-width: 701px) {
	
	.home_slider_heading h2 {
		font-size: 16px !important;
	}
	
	.nextend-arrow-next,
	.nextend-arrow-previous {
		top: calc(100% - 18px) !important;
	}
}


/* Layout fix */

body.home .n2-ss-slide {
	min-height: 520px !important;
}

body.home .n2-ss-slider .n2-ss-layer[data-sstype=content] {
	min-height: initial !important;
}


body.home .n2-ss-layer:not(:last-child) {
	margin-bottom: 20px !important;
}

body.home .n2-ss-section-main-content {
    width: 100% !important;
    max-width: 420px !important;
    min-width: initial !important;
    margin: 0 auto;
    background-color: #08304cf7 !important;
	padding: 32px 16px !important;
}

body.home .n2-ss-button-container a {
    background-color: #fff !important;
    color: #08304c !important;
    font-size: 18px !important;
    font-family: 'Raleway', sans-serif !important;
    padding: 8px 48px !important;
    border-radius: 4px !important;
	font-weight: 600 !important;
}

/* body.home .n2-ss-button-container a:after {
    content: "" !important;
} */

body.home .n2-ss-slider a.n2-ow:focus {
	outline: 2px solid #fff !important;
	outline-offset: 4px;
}



@media(max-width: 720px) {
	body.home .n2-ss-slide {
	min-height: 230px !important;
}

}</style>

/* Info Box Styling */
/* Keep rows even */
.home .info-boxes .row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: stretch;
}

/* Each box side-by-side inside itself */
.home .info-box {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row; /* horizontal layout */
  height: 100%;
  background: #fff;
  overflow: hidden;
}

/* Left side: image column */
.home  .info-box .photo {
  flex: 0 0 50%; /* image takes 50% of box width */
  overflow: hidden;
  display: flex;
}

/* Image fills entire column vertically */
.home .info-box .photo img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
}

/* Right side: text column */
.home .info-box .text {
  flex: 1;
  padding: 0px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
}

/* Make all boxes equal height in the row */
.home .col-md-4 {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.home .col-md-4 > .info-box {
  flex-grow: 1;
}

/* Optional: mobile stacking */
@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .home .info-box {
    flex-direction: column; /* stack image above text on small screens */
  }
  .home .info-box .photo {
    flex: 0 0 auto;
    height: 200px;
  }
}

.home #section_three .info-box .text h3 {
  margin-top: 0;        /* remove large default top margin */
  margin-bottom: 10px;  /* tighten gap below the title */
  line-height: 1.2;     /* keep compact vertical spacing */
}

.home #section_three .info-box .text {
  padding-top: 10px;
  padding-bottom: 10px;
}</style> <script language="javascript" type="litespeed/javascript">var PAGERESULT=888</script> <script type="litespeed/javascript">window.__lo_site_id=75537;(function(){var wa=document.createElement('script');wa.type='text/javascript';wa.async=!0;wa.src='https://d10lpsik1i8c69.cloudfront.net/w.js';var s=document.getElementsByTagName('script')[0];s.parentNode.insertBefore(wa,s)})()</script> </head><body class="wp-singular page-template-default page page-id-1092 wp-theme-malibu">

<a href="#" aria-label="Linkedin" class="addthis_button_linkedin"></a>

<a href="#" aria-label="Facebook" class="addthis_button_facebook"></a></div></div></div><hr class="line" /><div class="entry-content"><p data-start="388" data-end="424"><span style="font-size: 24pt;"><strong data-start="388" data-end="424">Serenity Malibu Rehab Admissions</strong></span></p><p data-start="426" data-end="663">At <a href="https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/">Serenity Malibu Rehab Center</a>, we are committed to treating every client and their loved ones with the utmost respect and compassion. From the moment you reach out, our priority is to ensure your individual needs are fully understood and supported.</p><p>Take the first step toward recovery with confidence. When you call, you’ll speak directly with a trained admissions counselor who will guide you personally through the admissions process at Serenity Malibu. We’re available 24/7</p><p><strong data-start="665" data-end="728">Call Our Experienced Admissions Counselor Now: <a href="tel:+14242352009">424-235-2009</a></strong></p><p> </p><p><img data-lazyloaded="1" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSIxNTM2IiBoZWlnaHQ9IjEwMjQiIHZpZXdCb3g9IjAgMCAxNTM2IDEwMjQiPjxyZWN0IHdpZHRoPSIxMDAlIiBoZWlnaHQ9IjEwMCUiIHN0eWxlPSJmaWxsOiNjZmQ0ZGI7ZmlsbC1vcGFjaXR5OiAwLjE7Ii8+PC9zdmc+" fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" class="aligncenter size-full wp-image-10165 img-responsive" data-src="https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/1.jpeg" alt="Executive care for rehabs in Malibu" width="1536" height="1024" data-srcset="https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/1.jpeg 1536w, https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/1-300x200.jpeg 300w, https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/1-1024x683.jpeg 1024w, https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/1-768x512.jpeg 768w" data-sizes="(max-width: 1536px) 100vw, 1536px" /></p><h3 data-start="985" data-end="1024"><span style="font-size: 18pt;">Your Dedicated Admissions Counselor</span></h3><p data-start="1026" data-end="1180">From your initial call, through your arrival at our luxury treatment center in Malibu, your dedicated admissions counselor will be by your side. They will:</p><ul data-start="1182" data-end="1499"><li data-start="1182" data-end="1250"><p data-start="1184" data-end="1250">Clearly explain the total cost of treatment and payment options.</p></li><li data-start="1251" data-end="1302"><p data-start="1253" data-end="1302">Assist with insurance verification and support.</p></li><li data-start="1303" data-end="1357"><p data-start="1305" data-end="1357">Coordinate your transportation to Serenity Malibu.</p></li><li data-start="1358" data-end="1444"><p data-start="1360" data-end="1444">Advise you on what to bring — and what to leave at home — for your inpatient stay.</p></li><li data-start="1445" data-end="1499"><p data-start="1447" data-end="1499">Answer any questions you may have about the process.</p></li></ul><p data-start="1501" data-end="1703">Upon your arrival, your admissions counselor and a client advocate will greet you personally. They will walk you through your first steps, help you settle in, and ensure you feel informed and supported.</p><p data-start="1705" data-end="1910">You’ll receive a full orientation, including a tour of our beautiful campus. Our staff will provide you with all necessary materials and be available around the clock to support your comfort and wellbeing.</p><h3 data-start="1912" data-end="1947"><span style="font-size: 18pt;">Your Initial Medical Assessment</span></h3><p data-start="1949" data-end="2161">Shortly after arrival, you’ll undergo a comprehensive medical assessment supervised by one of our licensed physicians. This evaluation will determine whether detoxification is required before beginning treatment.</p><p data-start="2163" data-end="2491">Depending on your needs, you may require initial rest and stabilization. Our goal is to ensure your comfort while helping you begin your recovery journey as quickly and safely as possible. During your stay, you’ll enjoy gourmet meals prepared by our executive chefs, along with snacks and beverages available throughout the day.</p><h3 data-start="2493" data-end="2527"><span style="font-size: 18pt;">Expert, Personalized Treatment</span></h3><p data-start="2529" data-end="2770">Your treatment will be delivered by a highly qualified team of doctors, psychologists, and holistic practitioners. Each program is customized and regularly refined to ensure it remains effective and aligned with your personal recovery goals.</p><h3 data-start="2772" data-end="2821"><span style="font-size: 18pt;">Discover Our Personalized Approach to Healing</span></h3><p data-start="2823" data-end="3062">We invite you to experience Serenity Malibu and meet the compassionate professionals who make our one-on-one, personalized approach to addiction treatment so effective. Discover why Serenity Malibu is a trusted choice for lasting recovery.</p><p>Visit <a href="https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/">Serenity Malibu</a> and meet our staff to experience how effective our personalized one-on-one approach to addiction treatment is and why we are the best choice for achieving long-term recovery.</p></div></article></div></section><section id="page_footer"><div class="container"><div class="row"><div class="col-md-6 left">

pages.rawText:
Admissions - Serenity Malibu 
 

 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 What to Expect from Our Rehab 

 Our Staff 

 Treatment Programs 

 Insurance Verification 

 Tour 

 Contact 
 

 

 
 
 

Standing by 24/7 - Free Insurance Check 

 424-235-2009
 

 Call Now 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 Welcome 

 About Us 

 Treatment 
 Drug Addiction Treatment 

 Dual Diagnosis Treatment Center 

 Detox Treatment Center 

 Outpatient Rehab Centers 
 

 What to Expect from Our Rehab 

 Admissions 

 Amenities 

 Financing 

 Free Insurance Verification 

 Our Staff 

 Executive & Professional Addiction Treatment Program 

 Gallery 

 Reviews & Testimonials 

 Contact Us 
 

 

 
 Home 

 >

 Admissions 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 Serenity Malibu Rehab Admissions 

At Serenity Malibu Rehab Center , we are committed to treating every client and their loved ones with the utmost respect and compassion. From the moment you reach out, our priority is to ensure your individual needs are fully understood and supported.

Take the first step toward recovery with confidence. When you call, you’ll speak directly with a trained admissions counselor who will guide you personally through the admissions process at Serenity Malibu. We’re available 24/7

 Call Our Experienced Admissions Counselor Now: 424-235-2009 

 

 

 Your Dedicated Admissions Counselor 

From your initial call, through your arrival at our luxury treatment center in Malibu, your dedicated admissions counselor will be by your side. They will:
 

Clearly explain the total cost of treatment and payment options.

Assist with insurance verification and support.

Coordinate your transportation to Serenity Malibu.

Advise you on what to bring — and what to leave at home — for your inpatient stay.

Answer any questions you may have about the process.

 
Upon your arrival, your admissions counselor and a client advocate will greet you personally. They will walk you through your first steps, help you settle in, and ensure you feel informed and supported.

You’ll receive a full orientation, including a tour of our beautiful campus. Our staff will provide you with all necessary materials and be available around the clock to support your comfort and wellbeing.

 Your Initial Medical Assessment 

Shortly after arrival, you’ll undergo a comprehensive medical assessment supervised by one of our licensed physicians. This evaluation will determine whether detoxification is required before beginning treatment.

Depending on your needs, you may require initial rest and stabilization. Our goal is to ensure your comfort while helping you begin your recovery journey as quickly and safely as possible. During your stay, you’ll enjoy gourmet meals prepared by our executive chefs, along with snacks and beverages available throughout the day.

 Expert, Personalized Treatment 

Your treatment will be delivered by a highly qualified team of doctors, psychologists, and holistic practitioners. Each program is customized and regularly refined to ensure it remains effective and aligned with your personal recovery goals.

 Discover Our Personalized Approach to Healing 

We invite you to experience Serenity Malibu and meet the compassionate professionals who make our one-on-one, personalized approach to addiction treatment so effective. Discover why Serenity Malibu is a trusted choice for lasting recovery.

Visit Serenity Malibu and meet our staff to experience how effective our personalized one-on-one approach to addiction treatment is and why we are the best choice for achieving long-term recovery.

 Request Help 

 Verify Insurance

<style type="text/css">:root {
	--accent-red: #BA2D0B;
	--black: #0D0106;
	--white: #ffffff;
	--dark-grey: #2D2D2A;
	--light-grey: #EFEFF0;
	--primary-blue: #0666A8;
	--secondary-blue: #03304F;
	--secondary-blue: #03304F;
	--light-blue: #3f92cc;
}

/* Global transitions */
a,
input[type="submit"],
.btn { transition: .3s; }


/* Global colors */
a { color: var(--accent-red) !important; }
a:hover { color: var(--accent-red) !important; }
body { color: var(--black); }



/* Sidebar - Main navigation */
.menu-item a { color: var(--white) !important; }
.menu-item a:hover {
	background-color: var(--accent-red) !important;
}

/* Globa elelements non-WCAG */
section#page_footer { border-color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }

section#section_three { border-color: var(--accent-red) !important; }



/* To Navigation background */
section#header {background-color: var(--light-blue) !important; }
/* To Navigation */
section#header .header-menu ul li a {
	background-color: var(--secondary-blue) !important;
	color: var(--white) !important;
/* 	border: 1px solid transparent !important; */
}
section#header .header-menu ul li a:hover {
	background-color: var(--white) !important;
	color: var(--secondary-blue) !important;
		border: 2px solid var(--primary-blue);
}
/* To Navigation Last Button */
section#header .header-menu ul li:last-child a { 
/* 	background-color: var(--accent-red) !important; */
/* 	border: 1px solid var(--white) !important; */
}
/* section#header .header-menu ul li:last-child a:after {
	content: "";
	width: calc(100% - 8px);
	height: calc(100% - 10px);
	position: absolute;
	top: 4px;
	left: 4px;
	border: 2px solid var(--light-blue);
} */

section#header .header-menu ul li:last-child a:hover {
	color: var(--accent-red) !important; 
	background-color: var(--white) !important;

}
/* Top Phone number */
header .right .phone a { color: var(--accent-red) !important; }
header .right .phone a:hover { color: var(--accent-red) !important; }


/* Icons - Fontawesome */
.fa { color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }


/* Headings */
h1.blue,
h2.blue,
h3.blue { color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }

.entry-content h2,
.entry-content h1,
.entry-content h3 { color: var(--primary-blue) }


/* Help Box */
.help-box { color: var(--accent-red) !important; }


/* Staff  */
.staff p.name { color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }


/* Footer */
section#footer { background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }
/* Footer - Phone Box */
section#footer .phone-box { background-color: var(--accent-red) !important; }
section#footer .phone-box .fa { color: var(--white) !important; }
section#footer .footer-menu ul li a { color: var(--white) !important; }
section#footer .footer-menu ul li a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }



/* Request Help Form */
section#section_four {
	background: linear-gradient( to right, var(--primary-blue) 0%, var(--primary-blue) 50%, var(--light-grey) 50%, var(--light-grey) 100% ) !important;
}
section#section_four .left { background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }
section#section_four .right { background-color: var(--light-grey) !important; }
section#section_four .left input[type="submit"] { 
	background-color: var(--accent-red) !important; 
	border: 1px solid var(--white) !important;
}
section#section_four .left input[type="submit"]:hover {
	background-color: var(--white) !important;
	color: var(--secondary-blue) !important;
}
section#section_four .right span { background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }

.form-group.white .error-msg {
	color: var(--white) !important;
}
section#section_four .left input[type="text"],
section#section_four .left input[type="email"] {
	background-color: var(--white) !important;
}
.znt-form-label {
	margin-bottom: 0;
}
.znt-form-label.white { color: var(--white) !important; }


/* Testiomonial Names */
.znt-testimonial-name {
	color: var(--primary-blue) !important;
	font-weight: bold;
}


/* Buttons */
.btn.btn-primary.znt-accent {
	background-color: var(--accent-red) !important;
	border: 1px solid var(--accent-red) !important;
}

.btn.btn-primary.znt-accent:hover {
	background-color: var(--white) !important;
	color: var(--accent-red) !important;
}


.btn.btn-primary {
	background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important;
	border: 1px solid var(--primary-blue) !important;
}

.btn.btn-primary:hover,
section#section_four .right a .btn.btn-primary:hover {
	background-color: var(--white) !important;
	color: var(--primary-blue) !important;
}


.znt-close-menu-button i,
.nav-back i {
	color: var(--white) !important;
}


.btn-default {
	border-color: var(--primary-blue);
}

.btn-default:hover {
	background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important;
	color: var(--white) !important;
}


/* Slider bullets container */
.n2-ss-slider-controls,
.n2-ss-slider-controls .nextend-bullet-bar {
	background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important;
}



/* Input form color */
.wpcf7-form-control:not([type="submit"]) {
	color: var(--black) !important;
}</style>
<style type="text/css">/* Add your CSS code here.

/* Form Styles */

.form-control {
	border: 1px solid #666;
}

.form-submit input[type="submit"] {
	background-color: #666;
}

/* .form-control:not([aria-invalid="true"]) { 
	display: none; 
} */

.form-control:not([aria-invalid="true"]) + .error-msg { 
	display: none; 
}

#date-error-msg_02:not(:last-child) { display: block !important; }

.wpcf7-not-valid-tip { 
	display: none !important; 
	visibility: hidden !important;
}

.error-msg {
/* 	font-size: 12px;
	font-weight: 700; */
	color: #BA2D0B; 
    font-size: 1em;
    font-weight: normal;
}

.error-msg + .error-msg,
#date-error-msg_02 + #date-error-msg_02 { display: none !important; }

.wpcf7-response-output {
	display: none !important;
}

.home .error-msg,
.home .wpcf7-response-output {
	color: #fff !important;
	position: relative;
}


/* Status message  */

.screen-reader-response {
    position: relative !important;
    overflow:  hidden !important;
    clip:  initial !important;
    clip-path: initial !important;
    height: initial !important;
    width: initial !important;
    margin: initial !important;
    padding: initial !important;
    border: initial !important;
    word-wrap: initial !important;
}

.screen-reader-response ul { display: none !important; }

.screen-reader-response p {
	padding-left: 32px;
	overflow: hidden;
	margin: 0 !important;
	
}

.screen-reader-response:before {
   content: "";
	position: absolute;
	left: 0;
	top: 0;
	display: inline-block;
	width: 20px;
	height: 18px;
	background-size: contain;
	background-repeat: no-repeat;
	background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,);
}


.home .screen-reader-response p {
	color: #fff !important;
	
}

.home .screen-reader-response:before {
	background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,);
}

.error-msg {
	padding-left: 30px;
	margin-top: 3px;
	position: relative;
}

.error-msg:before {
   content: "";
	position: absolute;
	left: 0;
	top: 3px;
	display: inline-block;
	width: 20px;
	height: 18px;
	background-size: contain;
	background-repeat: no-repeat;
	background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,);
}




.home .error-msg:before {
	background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,);
}






/* Request Form alignment */
.col-sm-6.left {
	margin-left: -1px;
}</style>

    background: var(--primary-blue) !important;
	padding: 15px 45px 15px;
}

.form-box h2.white {
    color: #ffffff !important;
}

.form-box input[type="submit"] {
    background-color: var(--accent-red) !important;
    border: 1px solid var(--white) !important;
    width: 100%;
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: bold;
    color: #FFF;
}

.photo-box img {
    float: left;
    margin-right: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
}

#bottom a {
    font-weight: 700;
}

.klaviyo-form a {
    color: #fff !important;
    text-decoration: underline;
}
/* Info Box Styling */
/* Keep rows even */
.home .info-boxes .row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: stretch;
}

/* Each box side-by-side inside itself */
.home .info-box {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row; /* horizontal layout */
  height: 100%;
  background: #fff;
  overflow: hidden;
}

/* Left side: image column */
.home  .info-box .photo {
  flex: 0 0 50%; /* image takes 50% of box width */
  overflow: hidden;
  display: flex;
}

/* Image fills entire column vertically */
.home .info-box .photo img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
}

/* Right side: text column */
.home .info-box .text {
  flex: 1;
  padding: 0px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
}

/* Make all boxes equal height in the row */
.home .col-md-4 {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.home .col-md-4 > .info-box {
  flex-grow: 1;
}

/* Optional: mobile stacking */
@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .home .info-box {
    flex-direction: column; /* stack image above text on small screens */
  }
  .home .info-box .photo {
    flex: 0 0 auto;
    height: 200px;
  }
}

.home #section_three .info-box .text h3 {
  margin-top: 0;        /* remove large default top margin */
  margin-bottom: 10px;  /* tighten gap below the title */
  line-height: 1.2;     /* keep compact vertical spacing */
}

.home #section_three .info-box .text {
  padding-top: 10px;
  padding-bottom: 10px;
}</style> <script language="javascript" type="litespeed/javascript">var PAGERESULT=888</script> <script type="litespeed/javascript">window.__lo_site_id=75537;(function(){var wa=document.createElement('script');wa.type='text/javascript';wa.async=!0;wa.src='https://d10lpsik1i8c69.cloudfront.net/w.js';var s=document.getElementsByTagName('script')[0];s.parentNode.insertBefore(wa,s)})()</script> </head><body class="wp-singular page-template-default page page-id-4122 wp-theme-malibu">

class="row"><div class="col-sm-9"><ul id="breadcrumbs" class="breadcrumbs"><li class="item-home"><a class="bread-link bread-home" href="https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com" title="Home">Home</a></li><li class="separator separator-home"> ></li><li class="item-current item-4122"><strong class="bread-current bread-4122"> Detailed Treatment Programs</strong></li></ul></div><div class="col-sm-3"><div class="addthis_toolbox addthis_default_style">
<a href="#" aria-label="Linkedin" class="addthis_button_linkedin"></a>
<a href="#" aria-label="Email" class="addthis_button_email"></a>
<a href="#" aria-label="Twitter" class="addthis_button_twitter"></a>
<a href="#" aria-label="Facebook" class="addthis_button_facebook"></a></div></div></div><hr class="line" /><div class="entry-content"><h1>Treatment Programs For Drug And Alcohol Addiction</h1><p>The Serenity Malibu alcohol and drug treatment program is systemic and comprehensive. Much of our specialized focus is on individual assessment, root causes, treatment planning and aftercare planning.</p><section id="section_five"><div class="container"><div class="row"><h2>Medical Management and Detoxification</h2><div class="col-md-4 left"><div class="photo-box"><img data-lazyloaded="1" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSIzNTAiIGhlaWdodD0iMjA2IiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgMzUwIDIwNiI+PHJlY3Qgd2lkdGg9IjEwMCUiIGhlaWdodD0iMTAwJSIgc3R5bGU9ImZpbGw6I2NmZDRkYjtmaWxsLW9wYWNpdHk6IDAuMTsiLz48L3N2Zz4=" fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" width="350" height="206" class="alignnone size-medium wp-image-6094 img-responsive" data-src="https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/medical-inspection-of-patient.jpg" alt="Medical Inspection of Patient" data-srcset="https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/medical-inspection-of-patient.jpg 350w, https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/medical-inspection-of-patient-300x177.jpg 300w" data-sizes="(max-width: 350px) 100vw, 350px" /></div></div><div class="col-md-8 right"><p>The road to a thorough and productive treatment experience begins with a strong medical assessment and consistent oversight. This is most important in the majority of our clients that require <a href="https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/drug-detox-treatment-center/">detoxification from drugs or alcohol</a>.</p><p>A healthy and comprehensive detox can be the difference to sustainable sobriety. This is one of many reasons why we are so focused and persistent about an individualized detox approach. A thorough history coupled with the assessment of our Board Certified Physician provides the necessary foundation and plan for long-term success.</p></div></div></div><div class="container"><div class="row"><h2>Family Diagnosis</h2><div class="col-md-4 left"><div class="photo-box"><img data-lazyloaded="1" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSIzNTAiIGhlaWdodD0iMjA2IiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgMzUwIDIwNiI+PHJlY3Qgd2lkdGg9IjEwMCUiIGhlaWdodD0iMTAwJSIgc3R5bGU9ImZpbGw6I2NmZDRkYjtmaWxsLW9wYWNpdHk6IDAuMTsiLz48L3N2Zz4=" decoding="async" width="350" height="206" class="alignnone size-medium wp-image-6095 img-responsive" data-src="https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/family-diagnosis-and-assessment.jpg" alt="Family Diagnosis and Assessment" data-srcset="https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/family-diagnosis-and-assessment.jpg 350w, https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/family-diagnosis-and-assessment-300x177.jpg 300w" data-sizes="(max-width: 350px) 100vw, 350px" /></div></div><div class="col-md-8 right"><p>Another key component to our program is the assessment and diagnosis of the family. <a href="https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/top-5-reasons-your-family-needs-family-therapy/">Family</a> dynamics are often times overlooked, but they can be an essential piece of the overall puzzle. This is not to say that the family is responsible for an addict’s behavior, but everyone has a role to play.</p><p>Whether it is an abundance of contact, or lack of contact, enabling the addict or lashing out at the addict, everyone in the family plays a part. Addiction is, after all, a disease that affects the entire family.</p><p>It is our job to work with our clients and their families to uncover underlying behavioral patterns in their given family dynamic and to help them find solutions and alternatives to acting out on these patterns.</p></div><p><em>Certain aspects of our family assessment process include, but are not limited to:</em></p><ul style="list-style-type: none;"><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>Intervention</li><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>Assessment and Recommendation for Treatment</li><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>Systemic Family Treatment</li><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>Family Education</li><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>Process Groups and Experiential Components</li></ul></div></div><div class="container"><div class="row"><h2>Relapse Prevention</h2><div class="col-md-4 left"><div class="photo-box"><img data-lazyloaded="1" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSIzNTAiIGhlaWdodD0iMjA2IiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgMzUwIDIwNiI+PHJlY3Qgd2lkdGg9IjEwMCUiIGhlaWdodD0iMTAwJSIgc3R5bGU9ImZpbGw6I2NmZDRkYjtmaWxsLW9wYWNpdHk6IDAuMTsiLz48L3N2Zz4=" decoding="async" width="350" height="206" class="alignnone size-medium wp-image-6096 img-responsive" data-src="https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/relapse-prevention-training.jpg" alt="Relapse Prevention Training" data-srcset="https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/relapse-prevention-training.jpg 350w, https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/relapse-prevention-training-300x177.jpg 300w" data-sizes="(max-width: 350px) 100vw, 350px" /></div></div><div class="col-md-8 right"><p>At <strong><em>Serenity Malibu</em></strong> we put great emphasis on relapse prevention training. Each of our clients receives this training on a weekly basis. Relapse prevention is a cognitive-behavioral approach to treating the disease of addiction, with the goal of detecting and preventing high-risk and compulsive behavior.</p><p>We work to address parallels in destructive behavior patterns with great focus and attention to possible contrary actions. It is through the willingness and commitment of our clients themselves that through Relapse Prevention training they are able to identify these patterns as they arise and are better equipped to handle situations that may have left them otherwise baffled.</p></div></div></div><div class="container"><div class="row"><h2>Aftercare Planning</h2><div class="col-md-4 left"><div class="photo-box"><img data-lazyloaded="1" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSIzNTAiIGhlaWdodD0iMjA2IiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgMzUwIDIwNiI+PHJlY3Qgd2lkdGg9IjEwMCUiIGhlaWdodD0iMTAwJSIgc3R5bGU9ImZpbGw6I2NmZDRkYjtmaWxsLW9wYWNpdHk6IDAuMTsiLz48L3N2Zz4=" loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="350" height="206" class="alignnone size-medium wp-image-6097 img-responsive" data-src="https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/aftercare-program-serenity-1.jpg" alt="Aftercare Program Serenity" data-srcset="https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/aftercare-program-serenity-1.jpg 350w, https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/aftercare-program-serenity-1-300x177.jpg 300w" data-sizes="auto, (max-width: 350px) 100vw, 350px" /></div></div><div class="col-md-8 right"><p>Leaving treatment can be a challenging and scary time for any recovering addict. That is why <a href="https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/malibu-addiction-recovery-resources-after-leaving-rehab/">aftercare planning</a> is essential in the treatment setting.</p><p>All of our goal-oriented work is centered on an overall plan. When framing a proper aftercare plan certain questions must come into account:</p><ul style="list-style-type: none;"><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>Will I be returning to a safe living environment?</li><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>What kind of support system will I be returning to?</li><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>Will I be employed, and if not what can I be doing to work towards employment?</li><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>Will I have the support of family, friends and loved ones?</li><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>In what ways will my treatment continue once I’m living at home?</li></ul></div></div><p><em>These questions are vital to the beginning stage of the aftercare process.</em></p><p>The idea that one’s recovery ends with treatment is a common misconception. Many of the skills that clients learn at Serenity are meant to be applied after initial treatment is completed. Many of our clients find that once they are acclimated back into their everyday lives, that they have to work even harder than they did in treatment in order to maintain a healthy recovery.</p><p>A good treatment center serves as a safe haven for any fear or temptations, and once the client leaves treatment it is easy to quickly fall into old patterns and behaviors. That is why we take our aftercare program so seriously. <em>Some of the features of our aftercare process include:</em></p><ul style="list-style-type: none;"><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>Graduation Presentation</li><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>Returns to Campus post treatment for alumni events quarterly</li><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>Weekly alumni conference phone calls</li><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>Opportunities to intern and volunteer at the Main Campus or from home.</li></ul></div><div class="container"><div class="row"><h2>Other Unique Benefits Offered at Serenity Malibu</h2><ul style="list-style-type: none;"><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i><a href="https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/where-trauma-assessment-fits-in-with-addiction-treatment-programs/">Trauma assessment</a> and trauma related therapies</li><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>Restorative therapies such as acupuncture and massage</li><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>Basic drug and neurobiology education</li><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>Four systemic treatment projects including a body map, genogram, timeline and exit plan</li><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>Individual, intensive one-on-one psychotherapy</li><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>Hypnotherapy to drill down into root causes</li><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>Brain Spotting, a cutting-edge treatment modality</li><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>Ocean Adventure including Surfing, Swimming and Kayaking</li><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>Introduction to and support from the recovery community</li><li><i class="fa fa-check" aria-hidden="true"></i>A presentation of readiness by each client to leave treatment to the staff and other clients</li></ul><p>Compassionate and understanding Client Advocates (“CAs”) are assigned to each new resident. Throughout a person’s stay at Serenity Malibu, CAs will help to manage and encourage each client on their individualized path to recovery and long-term sobriety.</p><p>Men and women who come to <a href="https://www.serenitymaliburehab.com/">our rehabilitation center</a> receive life-changing drug treatment that can truly alter the course of their lives for the better. If you or a loved one is ready to do the work, we are so confident that we can achieve success and long-term sobriety that we guarantee it!*</p></div></div></section></div></article></div></section><section id="page_footer"><div class="container"><div class="row"><div class="col-md-6 left">

Detailed Treatment Programs - Serenity Malibu 
 

 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 What to Expect from Our Rehab 

 Our Staff 

 Treatment Programs 

 Insurance Verification 

 Tour 

 Contact 
 

 

 
 
 

Standing by 24/7 - Free Insurance Check 

 424-235-2009
 

 Call Now 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 
 Welcome 

 About Us 

 Treatment 
 Drug Addiction Treatment 

 Dual Diagnosis Treatment Center 

 Detox Treatment Center 

 Outpatient Rehab Centers 
 

 What to Expect from Our Rehab 

 Admissions 

 Amenities 

 Financing 

 Free Insurance Verification 

 Our Staff 

 Executive & Professional Addiction Treatment Program 

 Gallery 

 Reviews & Testimonials 

 Contact Us 
 

 

 
 Home 

 >

 Detailed Treatment Programs 
 

 
 
 
 

 

Treatment Programs For Drug And Alcohol Addiction

The Serenity Malibu alcohol and drug treatment program is systemic and comprehensive. Much of our specialized focus is on individual assessment, root causes, treatment planning and aftercare planning.

Medical Management and Detoxification

 

The road to a thorough and productive treatment experience begins with a strong medical assessment and consistent oversight. This is most important in the majority of our clients that require detoxification from drugs or alcohol .

A healthy and comprehensive detox can be the difference to sustainable sobriety. This is one of many reasons why we are so focused and persistent about an individualized detox approach. A thorough history coupled with the assessment of our Board Certified Physician provides the necessary foundation and plan for long-term success.

Family Diagnosis

 

Another key component to our program is the assessment and diagnosis of the family. Family dynamics are often times overlooked, but they can be an essential piece of the overall puzzle. This is not to say that the family is responsible for an addict’s behavior, but everyone has a role to play.

Whether it is an abundance of contact, or lack of contact, enabling the addict or lashing out at the addict, everyone in the family plays a part. Addiction is, after all, a disease that affects the entire family.

It is our job to work with our clients and their families to uncover underlying behavioral patterns in their given family dynamic and to help them find solutions and alternatives to acting out on these patterns.

 Certain aspects of our family assessment process include, but are not limited to: 
 
 Intervention

 Assessment and Recommendation for Treatment

 Systemic Family Treatment

 Family Education

 Process Groups and Experiential Components
 

Relapse Prevention

 

At Serenity Malibu we put great emphasis on relapse prevention training. Each of our clients receives this training on a weekly basis. Relapse prevention is a cognitive-behavioral approach to treating the disease of addiction, with the goal of detecting and preventing high-risk and compulsive behavior.

We work to address parallels in destructive behavior patterns with great focus and attention to possible contrary actions. It is through the willingness and commitment of our clients themselves that through Relapse Prevention training they are able to identify these patterns as they arise and are better equipped to handle situations that may have left them otherwise baffled.

Aftercare Planning

 

Leaving treatment can be a challenging and scary time for any recovering addict. That is why aftercare planning is essential in the treatment setting.

All of our goal-oriented work is centered on an overall plan. When framing a proper aftercare plan certain questions must come into account:
 
 Will I be returning to a safe living environment?

 What kind of support system will I be returning to?

 Will I be employed, and if not what can I be doing to work towards employment?

 Will I have the support of family, friends and loved ones?

 In what ways will my treatment continue once I’m living at home?
 

 These questions are vital to the beginning stage of the aftercare process. 

The idea that one’s recovery ends with treatment is a common misconception. Many of the skills that clients learn at Serenity are meant to be applied after initial treatment is completed. Many of our clients find that once they are acclimated back into their everyday lives, that they have to work even harder than they did in treatment in order to maintain a healthy recovery.

A good treatment center serves as a safe haven for any fear or temptations, and once the client leaves treatment it is easy to quickly fall into old patterns and behaviors. That is why we take our aftercare program so seriously. Some of the features of our aftercare process include: 
 
 Graduation Presentation

 Returns to Campus post treatment for alumni events quarterly

 Weekly alumni conference phone calls

 Opportunities to intern and volunteer at the Main Campus or from home.
 

Other Unique Benefits Offered at Serenity Malibu
 
 Trauma assessment and trauma related therapies

 Restorative therapies such as acupuncture and massage

 Basic drug and neurobiology education

 Four systemic treatment projects including a body map, genogram, timeline and exit plan

 Individual, intensive one-on-one psychotherapy

 Hypnotherapy to drill down into root causes

 Brain Spotting, a cutting-edge treatment modality

 Ocean Adventure including Surfing, Swimming and Kayaking

 Introduction to and support from the recovery community

 A presentation of readiness by each client to leave treatment to the staff and other clients
 
Compassionate and understanding Client Advocates (“CAs”) are assigned to each new resident. Throughout a person’s stay at Serenity Malibu, CAs will help to manage and encourage each client on their individualized path to recovery and long-term sobriety.

Men and women who come to our rehabilitation center receive life-changing drug treatment that can truly alter the course of their lives for the better. If you or a loved one is ready to do the work, we are so confident that we can achieve success and long-term sobriety that we guarantee it!*

<style type="text/css">:root {
	--accent-red: #BA2D0B;
	--black: #0D0106;
	--white: #ffffff;
	--dark-grey: #2D2D2A;
	--light-grey: #EFEFF0;
	--primary-blue: #0666A8;
	--secondary-blue: #03304F;
	--secondary-blue: #03304F;
	--light-blue: #3f92cc;
}

/* Global transitions */
a,
input[type="submit"],
.btn { transition: .3s; }


/* Global colors */
a { color: var(--accent-red) !important; }
a:hover { color: var(--accent-red) !important; }
body { color: var(--black); }



/* Sidebar - Main navigation */
.menu-item a { color: var(--white) !important; }
.menu-item a:hover {
	background-color: var(--accent-red) !important;
}

/* Globa elelements non-WCAG */
section#page_footer { border-color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }

section#section_three { border-color: var(--accent-red) !important; }



/* To Navigation background */
section#header {background-color: var(--light-blue) !important; }
/* To Navigation */
section#header .header-menu ul li a {
	background-color: var(--secondary-blue) !important;
	color: var(--white) !important;
/* 	border: 1px solid transparent !important; */
}
section#header .header-menu ul li a:hover {
	background-color: var(--white) !important;
	color: var(--secondary-blue) !important;
		border: 2px solid var(--primary-blue);
}
/* To Navigation Last Button */
section#header .header-menu ul li:last-child a { 
/* 	background-color: var(--accent-red) !important; */
/* 	border: 1px solid var(--white) !important; */
}
/* section#header .header-menu ul li:last-child a:after {
	content: "";
	width: calc(100% - 8px);
	height: calc(100% - 10px);
	position: absolute;
	top: 4px;
	left: 4px;
	border: 2px solid var(--light-blue);
} */

section#header .header-menu ul li:last-child a:hover {
	color: var(--accent-red) !important; 
	background-color: var(--white) !important;

}
/* Top Phone number */
header .right .phone a { color: var(--accent-red) !important; }
header .right .phone a:hover { color: var(--accent-red) !important; }


/* Icons - Fontawesome */
.fa { color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }


/* Headings */
h1.blue,
h2.blue,
h3.blue { color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }

.entry-content h2,
.entry-content h1,
.entry-content h3 { color: var(--primary-blue) }


/* Help Box */
.help-box { color: var(--accent-red) !important; }


/* Staff  */
.staff p.name { color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }


/* Footer */
section#footer { background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }
/* Footer - Phone Box */
section#footer .phone-box { background-color: var(--accent-red) !important; }
section#footer .phone-box .fa { color: var(--white) !important; }
section#footer .footer-menu ul li a { color: var(--white) !important; }
section#footer .footer-menu ul li a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }



/* Request Help Form */
section#section_four {
	background: linear-gradient( to right, var(--primary-blue) 0%, var(--primary-blue) 50%, var(--light-grey) 50%, var(--light-grey) 100% ) !important;
}
section#section_four .left { background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }
section#section_four .right { background-color: var(--light-grey) !important; }
section#section_four .left input[type="submit"] { 
	background-color: var(--accent-red) !important; 
	border: 1px solid var(--white) !important;
}
section#section_four .left input[type="submit"]:hover {
	background-color: var(--white) !important;
	color: var(--secondary-blue) !important;
}
section#section_four .right span { background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important; }

.form-group.white .error-msg {
	color: var(--white) !important;
}
section#section_four .left input[type="text"],
section#section_four .left input[type="email"] {
	background-color: var(--white) !important;
}
.znt-form-label {
	margin-bottom: 0;
}
.znt-form-label.white { color: var(--white) !important; }


/* Testiomonial Names */
.znt-testimonial-name {
	color: var(--primary-blue) !important;
	font-weight: bold;
}


/* Buttons */
.btn.btn-primary.znt-accent {
	background-color: var(--accent-red) !important;
	border: 1px solid var(--accent-red) !important;
}

.btn.btn-primary.znt-accent:hover {
	background-color: var(--white) !important;
	color: var(--accent-red) !important;
}


.btn.btn-primary {
	background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important;
	border: 1px solid var(--primary-blue) !important;
}

.btn.btn-primary:hover,
section#section_four .right a .btn.btn-primary:hover {
	background-color: var(--white) !important;
	color: var(--primary-blue) !important;
}


.znt-close-menu-button i,
.nav-back i {
	color: var(--white) !important;
}


.btn-default {
	border-color: var(--primary-blue);
}

.btn-default:hover {
	background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important;
	color: var(--white) !important;
}


/* Slider bullets container */
.n2-ss-slider-controls,
.n2-ss-slider-controls .nextend-bullet-bar {
	background-color: var(--primary-blue) !important;
}



/* Input form color */
.wpcf7-form-control:not([type="submit"]) {
	color: var(--black) !important;
}</style>
<style type="text/css">/* Add your CSS code here.

For example:
.example {

For brushing up on your CSS knowledge, check out http://www.w3schools.com/css/css_syntax.asp

/* Form Styles */

.form-control {
	border: 1px solid #666;
}

.form-submit input[type="submit"] {
	background-color: #666;
}

/* .form-control:not([aria-invalid="true"]) { 
	display: none; 
} */

.form-control:not([aria-invalid="true"]) + .error-msg { 
	display: none; 
}

#date-error-msg_02:not(:last-child) { display: block !important; }

.wpcf7-not-valid-tip { 
	display: none !important; 
	visibility: hidden !important;
}

.error-msg {
/* 	font-size: 12px;
	font-weight: 700; */
	color: #BA2D0B; 
    font-size: 1em;
    font-weight: normal;
}

.error-msg + .error-msg,
#date-error-msg_02 + #date-error-msg_02 { display: none !important; }

.wpcf7-response-output {
	display: none !important;
}

.home .error-msg,
.home .wpcf7-response-output {
	color: #fff !important;
	position: relative;
}


/* Status message  */

.screen-reader-response {
    position: relative !important;
    overflow:  hidden !important;
    clip:  initial !important;
    clip-path: initial !important;
    height: initial !important;
    width: initial !important;
    margin: initial !important;
    padding: initial !important;
    border: initial !important;
    word-wrap: initial !important;
}

.screen-reader-response ul { display: none !important; }

.screen-reader-response p {
	padding-left: 32px;
	overflow: hidden;
	margin: 0 !important;
	
}

.screen-reader-response:before {
   content: "";
	position: absolute;
	left: 0;
	top: 0;
	display: inline-block;
	width: 20px;
	height: 18px;
	background-size: contain;
	background-repeat: no-repeat;
	background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,);
}


.home .screen-reader-response p {
	color: #fff !important;
	
}

.home .screen-reader-response:before {
	background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,);
}

.error-msg {
	padding-left: 30px;
	margin-top: 3px;
	position: relative;
}

.error-msg:before {
   content: "";
	position: absolute;
	left: 0;
	top: 3px;
	display: inline-block;
	width: 20px;
	height: 18px;
	background-size: contain;
	background-repeat: no-repeat;
	background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,);
}




.home .error-msg:before {
	background-image: url(data:image/png;base64,);
}






/* Request Form alignment */
.col-sm-6.left {
	margin-left: -1px;
}</style>

<style type="text/css">/* Smart Slider */

}

	position: absolute;

/* Info Box Styling */
/* Keep rows even */
.home .info-boxes .row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: stretch;
}

/* Each box side-by-side inside itself */
.home .info-box {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: row; /* horizontal layout */
  height: 100%;
  background: #fff;
  overflow: hidden;
}

/* Left side: image column */
.home  .info-box .photo {
  flex: 0 0 50%; /* image takes 50% of box width */
  overflow: hidden;
  display: flex;
}

/* Image fills entire column vertically */
.home .info-box .photo img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
}

/* Right side: text column */
.home .info-box .text {
  flex: 1;
  padding: 0px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
}

/* Make all boxes equal height in the row */
.home .col-md-4 {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.home .col-md-4 > .info-box {
  flex-grow: 1;
}

/* Optional: mobile stacking */
@media (max-width: 767px) {
  .home .info-box {
    flex-direction: column; /* stack image above text on small screens */
  }
  .home .info-box .photo {
    flex: 0 0 auto;
    height: 200px;
  }
}

.home #section_three .info-box .text h3 {
  margin-top: 0;        /* remove large default top margin */
  margin-bottom: 10px;  /* tighten gap below the title */
  line-height: 1.2;     /* keep compact vertical spacing */
}

.home #section_three .info-box .text {
  padding-top: 10px;
  padding-bottom: 10px;
}</style> <script language="javascript" type="litespeed/javascript">var PAGERESULT=888</script> <script type="litespeed/javascript">window.__lo_site_id=75537;(function(){var wa=document.createElement('script');wa.type='text/javascript';wa.async=!0;wa.src='https://d10lpsik1i8c69.cloudfront.net/w.js';var s=document.getElementsByTagName('script')[0];s.parentNode.insertBefore(wa,s)})()</script> </head><body class="wp-singular services-template-default single single-services postid-119 wp-theme-malibu">

rawMentions: Set in an exceptional 5-star environment, we provide on-site medical detox when needed.
Unlocking the Healing Power of a Malibu Detox
Why Medical Detox Is the Only Safe Way to Quit Benzos and Alcohol
A healthy and comprehensive detox can be the difference to sustainable sobriety.
This is one of many reasons why we are so focused and persistent about an individualized detox approach.
